line_items.description: Brand Identity Package -- logo design, color system, typography guidelines, and brand book (40 pages)

payment_terms: Net 30. Payment due by May 6, 2026. Late payments subject to 1.5% monthly interest after due date.
notes: Wire transfer preferred. Routing: 021000021, Account: 483920175. ACH and check also accepted. Please reference invoice number INV-2026-0042 on all payments.
